item.title: Masters degree in Physics
item.description: I don't even know if 500 downloads is considered a lot but I never thought it would get more than 20 downloads in my life, so I'm doing a little dance. But I'm also sick with COVID so it's not a very good dance. Edit: For those asking for a link to the article, I'm not super comfortable putting my name out there so I'll tell you the title is "Acoustic Waves in the Upper Atmosphere" and allow you to do some research of your own :)
item.dc:creator: IThinkIGotMySwaggerBack

item.title: It's an unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i live somewhat near Boston.. this is true in fall/winter
guilty of this
too cool
i can think of at least 400 reasons
no wonder he wants to marry her
i don't have a wife but i'll be damned if i don't pass out during most movies at home these days. doesn't help that i smoke weed and only get enough sleep on weekends
yeah not my oc and i dont believe in hell but i'll see you there
Stevie loves forehead kisses (really)
i'm already here waiting
mmm hmm
vampire life hack
i dunno, i kind of enjoy drinking water.
in my 'meme dump on imgur' era
well, you've got a skateboard so that's cool
i won't deny it
hate when that happens
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: I have a bottom shelf meme dump to show and tell you.
item.description:
Spoiler alert. It didn't...but you guys aren't here for trophies, you're here for:
The bottomest memes.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
They call me Tom. Bot Tom.
Mods please ignore the weiner pic.
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.description: Most viral edit. I'm here just for the points. Send something funny☺️.
item.dc:creator: joble

item.title: I always thought models were cool so as an adult I decided to make a scale model of my parents house where I grew up.
item.description:
I haven't shared this with anyone but my family and people who have came by my house. What yall think it's my first one.
Another angle.
I wasn't going to do the Walnut tree but I got bored.
The Model on top and real house on bottom.
I've since added facial board because of this pic. I'm obsessed with getting it exactly like my house.
The Barn
The boat is from a Revell model kit but I made the trailer from scratch.
I decided to add lights which the real barn does not have but the items on the shelf are very close to exact.
item.dc:creator: seth4881

item.title: Solardump
item.dc:creator: chicar

item.title: “That’s beautiful” (a comic)
item.description:
https://www.tumblr.com/jordanbolton/739678695245135872 Participation time! Now that we can leave long and meaningful comments, I’d love to know if a random thing made you stop in your tracks lately and think, “That’s beautiful.” What was it, and did you take a picture, and will you post it? (-: Disclaimer: this isn’t MY comic but I am often struck by random beauty in things. So I’ll go first:
Royal Poinciana trees have delicate little stems covered in itty bitty leaves arranged in pairs, themselves attached to bigger stems, which grow from still bigger branches, which grow in a lovely twisted, crooked, curvy way, so a tree limb looks a little like an arthritic palm frond made out of ferns. The gnarled wood contrasted with the daintiness of the leaflets just amazes me. This is looking skyward soon after sunrise from the two in my front yard.
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: I just don’t understand it
item.description: The dude directed an attack on the capital. As a service member nothing is more shocking than watching your capital burn and trashed. I’ll never understand putting your life on the line for a man that wants your rights to be taken away. This nation is sleepwalking into a dictatorship
item.dc:creator: JustAnotherVetOIF

item.title: Show and Tell: Living a good life really is the best revenge. :)
item.description: ****Edit: two typos in the meme I made. Should say ‘names’ and only ‘my ex and his wife combined’ not ‘you my ex and his wife’ haha! That’s what I get for trying to type at 4:30AM when sleep evaded me. ****. ***Edit 2: they are both public school teachers, so me making more than both combined is not even close to millions…lol! It’s just a solid bread-winning amount. Just want to clarify that bit.****. I know it’s petty but I have felt so proud of myself and my family as we have absolutely thrived. It didn’t happen right away, but since my divorce 7 years ago I went back to school and started a new career that has allowed me to achieve so many goals and make my family my focus which is my highest value. I bought a brand new house that allows my kids to each have their own bedroom this year and have enough to give back finally to those who need support. I really don’t have ill will toward my ex or any bitterness anymore, but I do feel quietly cheerful at times that while he’s working a job he hates for 40 hours a week, I get to create my own schedule (weeks I have my kids I work only 25-28 hours) and be the mom I want to be. My kids and I all have very strong lovely relationships at last after some darker years earlier when there was a lot of parental alienation happening. I also love my work and find my life incredibly fulfilling. :) My favorite part is modeling for my kids that even when someone hurts you, you can leave and choose to live a good life. I love that they can see new possibilities and hopes for their own life based on what we have accomplished together. #domesticviolence #survivor #showandtell #singleparent #singlemom #hope
item.dc:creator: livfit4life365

item.title: Images of Note: [All Screaming]

There's a reason why I have certain roles on the discord.
yeah basically
The Rock

splish

Aurora Borealis!
Return to gun crab
The comic is https://nortverse.com/ (NSFW, as in Tiddies on the first page NSFW)
I mean why not.

item.title: 123 men were arrested in Florida for human trafficking — Not one was a drag queen
item.description: "The men were arrested after allegedly soliciting sex from undercover agents posing as minors ... among them being a church grief counselor, an elementary school teacher, a nurse at a substance abuse clinic, and a basketball coach ..." https://www.advocate.com/crime/123-arrested-florida-human-trafficking
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: I made some fancy pants
item.description:
My new fancy pants make me feel fancy.
Japanese kurabo denim, with a blue selvedge. Stiffest denim I've ever touched. My borderline industrial vintage machine had trouble in a few spots and I had to hand sew. Wow this stuff is feisty!
Selvedge on the outseam, back pockets, and coin pockets. Copper rivets and buttons.
Button fly for old school feel, two coin pockets because they're quite nice for earbuds.
Seven belt loops so they stay put! Maybe I should have ironed them first, but who irons jeans? hahaha :D
item.dc:creator: diezl97

item.title: An Atlas a day.
item.description:
His feets may be cold, but his determination is unwavering.
A few folks asked for an extra Atlas yesterday, so I give the people what they want.
item.dc:creator: AtlasHuggedrescuepup
